issue_title: [Bug]: Social Share doesn't appear on privacy features on
issue_body_preview:
### Please take a moment to familiarize yourself with this project scope and standards

- [X] I have read the [Documentation](https://github.com/stefanobartoletti/nuxt-social-share?tab=readme-ov-file) and I understand how to correctly use this module.
- [X] I have read the [Contributing Guideline
test_description_zh: 在浏览器中开启隐私保护功能（如 Firefox 的增强型跟踪保护或使用隐私模式），访问包含社交分享按钮的页面，观察社交分享组件是否正常渲染并可正常点击交互。
expected_result_zh: 即使在浏览器隐私保护功能开启的情况下，社交分享按钮仍应正常显示在页面上，并且点击后能正确触发分享操作（如弹出分享窗口或跳转到对应社交平台的分享链接）。
